subject: Silicobra, a sandy-colored snake Pokemon with green eyes, coiled in a desert/sandy landscape
description: A rotund, sandy-beige snake creature is coiled in a loose spiral against a warm golden desert backdrop. The Pokemon has a rounded, almost panda-like face with large green eyes and a somewhat grumpy or scowling expression. Its body is segmented with darker bands of brown, and its coiled form dominates the center of the image. The background suggests an arid sandy landscape with muted amber and tan tones, and a faint horizon line with what may be cliffs or rock formations in the distance.
foreground: Coiled sandy-beige snake creature with dark banding
background: Desert sandy landscape with warm amber tones and faint rocky horizon
